scripts.build:merge: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const a=fs.readFileSync('./static/css/tailwind.css','utf8'); const b=fs.readFileSync('./static/css/style.min.css','utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('./static/css/app.css', a + b);"
scripts.build:css: npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:style && npm run build:merge && npm run build:minify-final
